finding: Exhibit J-1 (State Addenda to Disclosure Document) found at PDF pages 266-275. Cover page at 266, content starts at 267 with California addendum.
material_overrides_summary: California: liquidated damages may be unenforceable per Civil Code 1671; termination/non-renewal rights under BPC 20000-20043; NY law/VA venue may not be enforceable
Hawaii: general release shall not relieve from Hawaii franchise law liability
Michigan: see pages 5-6 of FDD for detailed Michigan provisions
Illinois, Minnesota, other registration states: standard franchise law compliance amendments
update_to_canonical: Exhibit J-1 page range updated to 266-275
